hero.headline: ENGINEERED FOR PERFORMANCE.
hero.subheadline: Gujarat-based manufacturer of high-performance industrial oils, automotive lubricants, and specialty greases — a brand of Jay Trading Company, built for domestic and global markets.

products.headline: PRECISION-FORMULATED FOR EVERY INDUSTRY
products.subheadline: From heavy industrial machinery to precision automotive engines, JRP Lubricants delivers performance-grade solutions engineered for the most demanding applications.

categories.name: Industrial Oils
categories.description: High-performance gear oils, turbine oils, compressor oils, and hydraulic fluids engineered for continuous heavy-duty industrial operations.
categories.specs: Viscosity grades ISO 32–680 | Temperature range -20°C to 220°C

categories.name: Automotive Lubricants
categories.description: Engine oils, transmission fluids, and brake fluids formulated to meet API, ACEA, and OEM specifications for passenger and commercial vehicles.
categories.specs: API SN/CF | ACEA A3/B4 | SAE 0W-20 to 20W-50

categories.name: Specialty Greases
categories.description: Lithium complex, calcium sulfonate, and polyurea greases for extreme pressure, high-temperature, and water-resistant applications.

categories.name: Marine & Heavy-Duty
categories.description: Cylinder oils, trunk piston engine oils, and stern tube lubricants designed for marine diesel engines and offshore industrial equipment.

whyJrp.headline: A BRAND BUILT ON QUALITY AND AMBITION
whyJrp.body: JRP Lubricants is the flagship brand of Jay Trading Company, established in 2018 in Gujarat. From day one, we set out to manufacture performance-grade lubricants that meet international standards — and to build the infrastructure needed to serve both domestic customers and global export markets. We're export-ready, compliance-certified, and growing fast.

differentiators.title: In-House R&D
differentiators.description: Dedicated research and development lab with advanced tribology testing capabilities.

differentiators.title: ISO 9001:2015 Certified
differentiators.description: Rigorous quality management systems ensuring consistent product performance batch after batch.

differentiators.title: Custom Formulations
differentiators.description: Bespoke lubricant development for OEMs and industrial clients with unique application requirements.

differentiators.title: Export Ready
differentiators.description: Full export documentation, compliance certifications, and flexible packaging — ready to serve international distributors and buyers.

export.headline: MANUFACTURED IN GUJARAT. READY FOR THE WORLD.
export.subheadline: JRP Lubricants is fully equipped to serve international markets — with export-grade packaging, compliance documentation, and the product range to meet global demand.

regions.name: Middle East
regions.countries: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Bahrain

regions.name: Africa
regions.countries: Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Egypt, Tanzania, Ghana

cta.headline: READY TO PARTNER WITH JRP?
cta.subheadline: Whether you're a distributor, OEM, or industrial buyer — JRP Lubricants offers flexible B2B partnerships, private labelling, and export programs tailored to your market.
